description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style double chair frame constructed from metallic rectangular tubing. The structure features two distinct seating areas, each with a high, angular backrest and open seat base, likely intended for the addition of cushions or panels. The frame is composed of straight, geometric lines, giving it a modern and utilitarian appearance. The metallic surface has a slightly reflective, brushed finish, suggesting it is made from steel or a similar alloy. The open design allows visibility through the frame, with no solid panels or upholstery present. This chair is suitable for urban environments such as parks, public plazas, or waiting areas where durability and weather resistance are important.
description: A sturdy, metallic double chair frame with angular backrests and an open, geometric design, ideal for urban outdoor use.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the chair from a front-side angle, highlighting both backrests and the open seat frames.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a direct front view, clearly displaying the two seating areas and the symmetry of the frame.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a side perspective, emphasizing the depth of the seat and the angular support of the backrests.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the chair from the rear, focusing on the backrest supports and the open structure of the frame.
